content:
CALL TRANSCRIPT
Customer: Bluewater Financial
Customer ID: C003
Contract ID: K015
Account Executive: Sarah Chen
Call Type: Mid-Year Business Review
Date: October 3, 2024
Participants: Sarah Chen (AE), Marcus Webb (Head of Financial Analytics), Christine Yau (Chief Risk Officer)

Sarah Chen: Christine, great to have you on the call. Marcus has been a fantastic partner and I'm glad we have the chance to connect directly.

Christine Yau: Likewise. Marcus gave me a strong briefing before this. I wanted to hear from you about where the product is heading, particularly around audit capabilities.

Sarah Chen: Audit logging is a priority for us. At the Enterprise tier you're on, every user action is logged with a full timestamp and user attribution. We're also adding tamper-evident log exports in Q1 2025, which I think will be relevant for your regulatory reporting.

Christine Yau: That's exactly what I was hoping to hear. Our compliance team has been asking about immutable audit trails for two years. If that ships in Q1 we'll want to evaluate it immediately.

Marcus Webb: Sarah, I also want to flag that we've had a couple of questions from our compliance team about using InsightIQ for their reporting workflows. That's potentially 8 to 10 more users.

Sarah Chen: I'd love to set up a separate call with the compliance team lead to walk through their specific requirements. We have customers in highly regulated environments using InsightIQ for compliance reporting today — I can bring a case study.

Christine Yau: Let's do that in Q1 once we see the audit log update.

Sarah Chen: Perfect. I'll follow up with proposed dates in January.
